name: Mexican BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, stir together the corn syrup, coffee, ketchup, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, chili powder (use 4 to 6 tablespoons), corn oil, dry mustard, salt, and hot pepper sauce.
2. Stirring frequently, bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Once boiling, continue cooking for 5 minutes.
4. Brush the sauce onto chicken, pork chops, spareribs, or steak during the last 20 minutes of grilling. Turn and baste frequently with the sauce.
5. This recipe makes about 1 1/2 cups of sauce.
